
.gitignore

# Ignore unwanted shares
main/CMakeLists.txt
main/inc/passwords.h

# Ignore unused implementations
main/src/range_sensor.c
main/inc/range_sensor.h
main/src/radar_ble_nimble.c
main/inc/radar_ble.h

# Ignore build output
/build/
/*.elf
/*.bin
/*.map
#commented out-- sdkconfig shoul be available on github
#sdkconfig
#/sdkconfig.old

# Ignore CMake generated files
CMakeFiles/
CMakeCache.txt
cmake_install.cmake
Makefile

# Ignore VS Code settings
.vscode/

# Ignore logs and debugging output
*.log

# Ignore core dumps
core.*

# Ignore hidden system files (macOS, Windows)
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

# Ignore ESP-IDF managed python environments
.python-env/
